report.summary: 4 new learn pages built since last standup (portfolio construction, DeFi looping, Taiko L2, TEE crypto). Learn dirs now at 173. FOCIL ghost promotion still unresolved. Middleware noindex blocker persists across 5+ standup cycles — escalation critical.

sections.title: Analytics
items: Traffic delta vs last cycle: flat — overnight US hours (06:00 UTC), minimal organic volume expected
No new keyword breakouts detectable; impressions and CTR stable across existing rankings
Top pages holding: ETH staking calc, liberation-day, exchange compare hub, DCA calc, gas tracker
CRITICAL (carry-over, cycle 5+): Middleware noindex blocks ~684 of ~742 sitemap pages — only ~58 pillar pages indexable (8%)
Content velocity strong: 4 new pages built since v4 standup (~2h ago), data files now at learn-20260410-v7
Learn page count on disk: 173 directories (up from 170 at v4 — portfolio construction, DeFi looping, Taiko, TEE added)

sections.title: Project Manager
items: Since last standup (v4, 04:08 UTC): 4 new learn pages built and landed on disk with page.tsx + data files
New pages: (1) Crypto Portfolio Construction & Position Sizing, (2) DeFi Looping & Leveraged Yield Strategies, (3) Taiko Based ZK-Rollup Ethereum L2, (4) TEE Trusted Execution Environments in Crypto
Data files progressed from learn-20260410-v3 to learn-20260410-v7 (4 new builds this cycle)
FOCIL guide: STILL ghost-promoted — /learn/focil-inclusion-lists-guide-2026/ directory does NOT exist on disk (cycle 5+ of flagging)
Blocked in queue: monad-guide and zora-attention-markets — no page.tsx (carry-over)
All 4 new pages ready for publish queue promotion pending metadata validation
Today's total output: ~7 data file versions, 4 new page directories, 2 publish cycles

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: 1) ESCALATE CRITICAL: Middleware PILLAR_PAGES ↔ PUBLISHED_PAGES sync — 684 pages de-indexed for 5+ cycles. This is the single highest-ROI fix available: one code change unlocks organic discovery for ~92% of content.

2) RESOLVE GHOST: FOCIL guide ghost promotion — either scaffold the page (page.tsx + data) or remove from PUBLISHED_PAGES to stop 404s and wasted crawl budget. Flagged for 5+ cycles without resolution.

3) PROMOTE NEW CONTENT: 4 fresh pages (portfolio construction, DeFi looping, Taiko, TEE) are on disk — add to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Combined with MegaETH, Pyth, Sanctum from prior cycles = 7 pages ready to ship.

metrics.label: FOCIL Ghost Promotion
metrics.value: Still missing — no directory on disk
